message:
fix(testkit): fix cancellation test race and add follow-up request test

Rewrite the mock_server cancellation test to avoid a timing race: spawn
the request in a separate task, poll until wiremock observes the request,
then cancel the context explicitly instead of racing a 25ms sleep against
the delayed response. This makes the test deterministic.

Add mock_server_reqwest_follow_up_request_succeeds_after_cancellation
test validating that a fresh ExecutionContext can issue a successful
request on the same reqwest::Client after a prior context was cancelled.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
